allow: Bash(npx --yes acorn --ecma2020 --module src/lib/api.js > /dev/null 2>&1 && echo "api.js: OK" || echo "api.js: FAIL")
Bash(npx -y acorn --ecma2022 --module src/App.jsx > /dev/null 2>&1 && echo "OK" || echo "SYNTAX ERROR")
Bash(cd /mnt/e/goProject/TgLpBot/webapp && npx vite build --logLevel error 2>&1 | tail -20)

Bash(cd /mnt/e/goProject/TgLpBot/miniapp/src && grep "^export async function\\|^export function" lib/api.js | sed 's/^export.*function \\\([a-zA-Z]*\\\).*/\\1/' | sort > /tmp/miniapp_exports.txt && grep -r "import.*from.*api" components/*.jsx App.jsx | grep -o "{[^}]*}" | tr ',' '\\n' | sed 's/[{}]//g' | sed 's/^[[:space:]]*//;s/[[:space:]]*$//' | grep -v "^$" | sort | uniq > /tmp/miniapp_imports.txt && comm -23 /tmp/miniapp_exports.txt /tmp/miniapp_imports.txt)

Bash(cd /mnt/e/goProject/TgLpBot/miniapp/src && grep -h "import.*from.*'.*api" components/*.jsx App.jsx 2>/dev/null | tr '{' '\\n' | tr '}' '\\n' | grep -E "^[[:space:]]*[a-z]" | sed 's/^[[:space:]]*//;s/,.*//' | sort | uniq)
Bash(cd /mnt/e/goProject/TgLpBot && for f in backend/service/liquidity/*.go; do grep -n "^[[:space:]]*//[^/]" "$f" | head -5 && echo "---"; done | head -50)

Bash(cd /mnt/e/goProject/TgLpBot && echo "=== Checking all potentially unused functions ===" && for func in "RoundToTickSpacing" "CalculatePriceFromTick" "CalculateTickFromPrice" "GetCurrentTickFromSqrtPriceX96" "FormatTickRange"; do echo "=== $func ===" && grep -r "$func" backend --include="*.go" | grep -v "tick_calculator.go" | wc -l; done)
Bash(cd /mnt/e/goProject/TgLpBot && for func in "PriceRangeDisplay" "RangeAlertLines"; do echo "=== $func ===" && grep -r "$func" backend --include="*.go" | wc -l; done)

Bash(curl -s -X POST https://bsc-dataseed.binance.org/ -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"eth_getTransactionByHash","params":["0x2f3e35f6773a9003343a8005055cad6ea08f6ade5be53c8e263f69ff370915ac"],"id":1}' | python3 -m json.tool 2>/dev/null || curl -s -X POST https://bsc-dataseed.binance.org/ -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"eth_getTransactionByHash","params":["0x2f3e35f6773a9003343a8005055cad6ea08f6ade5be53c8e263f69ff370915ac"],"id":1}')

Bash(curl -s -X POST https://bsc-dataseed.binance.org/ -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"eth_getTransactionReceipt","params":["0x2f3e35f6773a9003343a8005055cad6ea08f6ade5be53c8e263f69ff370915ac"],"id":1}' | python3 -m json.tool 2>/dev/null)

Bash(curl -s -X POST https://bsc-dataseed.binance.org/ -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"eth_call","params":[{"to":"0x97693439ea2f0ecdeb9135881e49f354656a911c","data":"0x95d89b41"},"latest"],"id":1}' | python3 -c "
import sys, json
data = json.load\(sys.stdin\)['result']
hex_str = data[2:]
if len\(hex_str\) >= 128:
    length = int\(hex_str[64:128], 16\)
    symbol = bytes.fromhex\(hex_str[128:128+length*2]\).decode\('utf-8', errors='replace'\)
    print\('Symbol:', symbol\)
")

Bash(cat /mnt/e/goProject/TgLpBot/contracts/artifacts/contracts/ZapSimple.sol/ZapSimple.json | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(d['bytecode'][2:]\)" > /mnt/e/goProject/TgLpBot/backend/base/blockchain/bytecode/zap_simple_bytecode.hex 2>&1 && wc -c /mnt/e/goProject/TgLpBot/backend/base/blockchain/bytecode/zap_simple_bytecode.hex)
Bash(find /mnt/e/goProject/TgLpBot/webapp -type d \\\(-name icon* -o -name img -o -name image* -o -name asset* -o -name public \\\))
